summary: DHH promotes the fifth installment of 37signals' 'Building of Basecamp' workshop, returning to Chicago for a full-day event. The workshop covers their approach to teams, vision, programming, design, and marketing for launching online ventures. He teases coverage of Ta-da List and an upcoming application code-named 'Honey.' He notes that all previous workshops sold out quickly with high participant ratings.
key_points: 37signals ran recurring paid workshops teaching their product development philosophy
The workshops covered the full spectrum from team dynamics to marketing, not just technical topics
They were teasing upcoming products (Ta-da List and 'Honey') as part of their workshop content
Previous workshops consistently sold out within weeks with 4.5+ out of 5 ratings
money_quotes: We'll be covering our approach to teams, vision, programming, designing, marketing — everything involved in launching a successful online venture, like Basecamp.
key_insight: 37signals built a loyal following early on by openly teaching their full product development philosophy through sold-out workshops, turning transparency into both a marketing channel and a revenue stream.
